summary: Comprehensive testing of Triple Lock Section Security feature - All backend APIs (8 endpoints) and frontend UI components working correctly
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health returns healthy status ✓
Backend: GET /api/security/settings returns all 6 sections with correct structure ✓
Backend: GET /api/security/questions returns 10 preset security questions ✓
Backend: PUT /api/security/settings/sdv with password_enabled=true creates password security ✓
Backend: POST /api/security/verify/sdv with correct password returns verified=true ✓
Backend: POST /api/security/verify/sdv with wrong password returns 401 ✓
Backend: PUT /api/security/settings/mm with security_question creates Q&A security ✓
Backend: POST /api/security/verify/mm with correct answer returns verified=true ✓
Backend: POST /api/security/verify/mm with wrong answer returns 401 ✓
Backend: Lock modes (manual, on_page_leave, on_logout) all save correctly ✓
Backend: Invalid lock mode correctly rejected with 400 ✓
Backend: DELETE /api/security/settings/{section} removes security ✓
Backend: Invalid section_id returns 400 for all operations ✓
Backend: No security configured returns verified=true ✓
Frontend: Settings page renders Section Security (Triple Lock) card ✓
Frontend: All 6 sections (SDV, MM, BM, IAC, DTS, EGA) listed in security settings ✓
Frontend: Section row expands on click showing Layer 1/2/3 toggles ✓
Frontend: Lock Behavior dropdown visible with 3 modes ✓
Frontend: Password toggle enables password input field ✓
Frontend: Voice Biometric toggle and enrollment UI present ✓
Frontend: Security Question toggle with question dropdown present ✓
Frontend: Save security button visible and enabled when layers selected ✓
Frontend: SectionLockBanner renders on Vault page (SDV) ✓
Frontend: SectionLockBanner renders on Guardian page (EGA) ✓
Frontend: SectionLockBanner renders on Messages page (MM) ✓
Frontend: SectionLockBanner renders on Checklist page (IAC) ✓
Frontend: SectionLockBanner renders on Beneficiaries page (BM) ✓
seed_data_creation: Test security settings created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Triple Lock Section Security feature fully implemented and working. Security settings are user-specific and stored in MongoDB collection 'section_security'. The SectionLockBanner component shows 'Section Unlocked' (purple) when no security configured, and 'Locked' (red) when security is active. Voice biometric enrollment requires actual audio recording so skip automated tests for that. The 3 lock modes are: on_page_leave (auto-lock when leaving page), on_logout (auto-lock on logout), manual (lock only on command).

security_layers.Layer 2 - Voice Biometric: UI present - skipped automated audio test
